summary: Frontend-only testing of new PillarWisePicks component. All features tested and verified working correctly. The component displays personalized product recommendations grouped by pillar (Nourish/Play/Groom/Fitness/Celebrate) with 'For Max' badges on all products.
critical_code_review_comments: PillarWisePicks.jsx - Well-structured component with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Component uses lazy loading with React.Suspense which is good for performance
Note: The /member page causes browser crashes due to heavy component load, but /dashboard works fine and contains the PillarWisePicks
context_for_next_testing_agent: PillarWisePicks component is located in /dashboard page (not /member). The component displays correctly with pillar tabs (Nourish/Play/Groom/Fitness/Celebrate), each showing 4 products with 'For [PetName]' badge. Shop All button navigates to /shop?pillar=recommended.

features_tested.navigate_to_dashboard: PASS - User redirected to /dashboard after login
features_tested.header_shows_picks_for_petname: PASS - Shows 'Picks for Max' with subtitle 'Curated for your Golden Retriever'
features_tested.pillar_tabs_display: PASS - All 5 tabs displayed: Nourish(4), Play(4), Groom(4), Fitness(4), Celebrate(4)
features_tested.nourish_tab_click: PASS - Shows '🍽️ Nourish picks for Max' with 4 products
features_tested.play_tab_click: PASS - Shows '🎾 Play picks for Max' with 4 products
features_tested.groom_tab_click: PASS - Shows '✂️ Groom picks for Max' with 4 products
features_tested.celebrate_tab_click: PASS - Shows '🎂 Celebrate picks for Max' with 4 products
features_tested.for_petname_badge: PASS - All products display 'For Max' badge
features_tested.shop_all_button: PASS - Button 'Shop All for Max' navigates to /shop?pillar=recommended
features_tested.products_change_on_tab_click: PASS - Products correctly change when switching between pillar tabs
features_tested.personalization_footer: PASS - Shows 'All picks are personalized based on Max's breed, age, and preferences'

pillar_wise_picks.header: Picks for Max - Curated for your Golden Retriever
pillar_wise_picks.footer: All picks are personalized based on Max's breed, age, and preferences

notes: The /member page causes browser crashes during Playwright testing due to heavy component load
Use /dashboard route instead which contains the same PillarWisePicks component
Test user 'Test' has pet 'Max' (Golden Retriever) with 75% Soul completion
